---
pagetitle: "Reviews · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  id: reviews-listing
  contents: "posts/reviews/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: "220px"
---

```{=html}
<div class="rrb-container">
<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ Department</div>
  <h1>Reviews</h1>
  <div class="dek">Book reviews — novels, history, poetry, memoir, biography.</div>
</div>
</div>
```

::: {#reviews-listing}
:::
